title: BBC News - Breaking news, video and the latest top stories from the U.S. and around the world
content:
News
Starmer announces extra £15bn for UK defence, with some road and energy projects scrapped to help fund it
Angry Venezuelans accuse government of negligence over earthquake response
Manhunt under way after bomb injures Ukrainian oligarch and others in Monaco
Heavy security in South Africa as anti-migrant protesters take to the streets
Founder of Asian super-app Gojek sentenced to years in jail...

images.alt_text: starmer
A woman with a grey t-shirt covering her head holds up a mobile phone to display a photo of her with her two teenage daughters.
Gojek founder Nadiem Makarim appears in court for the verdict in his high profile corruption trial in Jakarta, Indonesia
Chinese billionaire Guo Wengui places his hands together while speaking on stage during a news conference in 2018 in New York
A fruit seller cutting durian at a stall
People walk past a Jio signage at an event in Mumbai, India, on 3 May 2025.
Homeland Security secretary Markwayne Mullin smiles during a House Appropriations Subcommittee hearing in Washington DC on 25 June 2026
Morocco players hold their arms aloft, with broad smiles, after their victory
Germany boss Julian Nagelsmann and goalkeeper Manuel Neuer
Former South Korea's head coach Hong Myung-bo meet by fans as he arrives at airport
Netherlands players embrace Cody Gakpo after he scores against Morocco
The Strawberry Moon appears orange over cliffs in Dorset
Denis Shapovalov grimaces
Andy Burnham, wearing a black jacket and t-shirt, stands at a podium.
The Canada and US flags flap in the wind on flag polls as a truck stacked with cars for sale drives by
The BBC's Will Grant reports from the site of a collapsed building in La Guaira, Venezuela

Volunteers conduct search operations in a building damaged by an earthquake in La Guaira, Venezuela, 29 June 2026. National and international rescue teams continue their efforts among the ruins of buildings in the coastal state of La Guaira, north of Caracas
Zuly Marín, dressed in a white shirt and black glasses, stares into space.
A firefighter wearing a helmet and heavy-duty jacket holds a small camera device up in his hand as he searches for survivors of the earthquakes in La Guaira, Venezuela.
People inspect a damaged house at the site of Pakistani airstrikes in Mandokhail village in Paktia province, Afghanistan
A composite image of Princess Catherine and a boy in a wheelchair on a mountain
WhatsApp logo displayed on a smartphone screen, with its logo shown alongside those of Meta apps Facebook, Instagram and Threads.
South Korean President Lee Jae-myung speaking during a news conference at the presidential Blue House in Seoul
Kylian Mbappe, Alexander Isak, Yan Diomande & Erling Haaland
Katie Boulter
Kobbie Mainoo wearing an England training top

metadata.description: Visit BBC News for the latest news, breaking news, video, audio and analysis. BBC News provides trusted World, U.S. and U.K. news as well as local and regional perspectives. Also entertainment, climate, business, science, technology and health news.
headings: News
Starmer announces extra £15bn for UK defence, with some road and energy projects scrapped to help fund it
Angry Venezuelans accuse government of negligence over earthquake response
Manhunt under way after bomb injures Ukrainian oligarch and others in Monaco
Heavy security in South Africa as anti-migrant protesters take to the streets
Founder of Asian super-app Gojek sentenced to years in jail for corruption
Chinese tycoon sentenced to 30 years in US jail
Why $20 durians are now being sold at half price - or given away for free
India's biggest share sales tell the story of a country glued to its phones
World Cup 2026: France v Sweden & Ivory Coast v Norway to come as last 32 continues
One big win and three defeats for Trump in dramatic day at Supreme Court
Indian journalists condemn 'denial' of voting and passport rights of prominent editor
Osaka pays 'love and respect to Japan' in Wimbledon kimono
Six people shot dead at centre for mothers and children in Germany
World Cup 2026
US security chief 'danced happy dance' after Iran exit
Morocco underline African hopes by beating Netherlands on penalties
The end for Nagelsmann? Germany suffer their 'next football nightmare'
Why are South Korean fans so angry at their football coach?
Emotional Gakpo scores days after loss of unborn son
More to explore
Full Strawberry Moon captured over the UK in stunning photos
Frank Gardner: Navy plans reflect sea change in how wars are fought
Loved and loathed: The making of India's viral liver doctor
Is tennis' relentless nature causing injury crisis?
Chris Mason: Burnham revels on public stage but has little time to hammer ideas into shape
What to know about the looming  deadline on North American free trade
Venezuela earthquake
Rescuers keep up search for survivors at collapsed La Guaira building
Aftershock frays nerves as many Venezuelans left to fend for themselves
'No one move!': The agonising silence as La Guaira rescuers listen for survivors
Dogs, drones and sound detectors: How rescuers search for quake survivors
Most watched
Watch: Young bald eagle takes first flight in California
Aerial video shows extent of deadly flash flooding in Kentucky
Watch: Australian charged with murder of Thai teen found in suitcase
Debris falls after plane hits Beijing's tallest building
Also in news
Pakistani strikes kill at least 28 civilians in Afghanistan, UN says
Boy doing Three Peaks Challenge meets Catherine
Trump's final appeal of E Jean Carroll sex abuse case rejected
WhatsApp to let people chat by swapping usernames instead of phone numbers
South Korea unveils $880bn chip and AI investment plan
Most read
We had packed lunches every day for 10 years and retired at 40
Lilo & Stitch star Daveigh Chase's cause of death was Aids
Sport
Wimbledon day two - follow live
Arsenal poised - can Newcastle convince Guimaraes for a second time?
'I never expected to be here' - Williams returns to Wimbledon
'Germany no longer first-class team ' - is this the end for Nagelsmann?
Pick Mainoo over Anderson against DR Congo - Rooney
The BBC is in multiple languages
Read the BBC In your own language
